title: isabelia × pabstii
intro: Isabelia × pabstii, also known as the Pabst's isabelia or isabelia pabstii, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to the presence of isobutylamides which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of isabelia pabstii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Isabelia pabstii can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its availability is limited due to its rarity.
